originalTitle: Watch: Horses evacuated as fire approaches riding centre near Paris
summary: The Fontainebleau forest blaze, described by officials as of 'exceptional scale', continues to rage for the second day.
content:
Horses have been evacuated from an equestrian centre near Paris as the Fontainebleau wildfire continues to rage.

Firefighters have been battling to bring the blaze under control over the last two days, with officials describing it as "virulent" and of "exceptional scale".

Interior minister Laurent Nunez indicated the fire may have been deliberately set, after officials said the blaze had raced across 800 hectares in the forest about 40 miles (60km) south-east of Paris.

The Paris region is suffering through its third heatwave this year during a summer in which temperature records have been broken in several countries across Europe.

More on this story: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
chineseTitle: 观看：巴黎附近骑马中心大火逼近，马匹被疏散
chineseSummary: 官方称枫丹白露森林大火“规模异常”，并已连续第二天肆虐。
chineseContent:
随着枫丹白露野火继续肆虐，巴黎附近马术中心的马匹已被疏散。

过去两天，消防队员一直在努力控制火势，官员们称火势“凶猛”且“规模异常”。

内政部长劳伦特·努涅斯 (Laurent Nunez) 表示，大火可能是有人故意纵火，此前官员称，大火已蔓延至巴黎东南约 40 英里（60 公里）的森林，面积达 800 公顷。

巴黎地区正在经历今年夏季的第三次热浪，欧洲多个国家的气温记录都被打破。

更多关于这个故事的信息：部长说，巴黎南部肆虐的野火可能是故意纵火的
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
